mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO FROM BOARD WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.BOARD_NO ,B.BOARD_TITLE ,B.BOARD_CONTENT ,B.COUNT ,C.CATEGORY_NAME ,M.MEMBER_ID FROM BOARD B Join Category C USING(CATEGORY_NO) Join MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
